name: USP消音版 | 疯狂蔓延
descriptionEn: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. This memento from Siege has been painted using a camo hydrographic. Look me in the eyes and tell me that's standard issue - Felix Riley, Commanding Officer
descriptionZh: 从《反恐精英：起源》中穿越而来，是玩家们的最爱，消音版 USP 手枪装有一个可拆卸的消音器，降低后坐力的同时还能抑制住容易引起注意的枪声。 这把来自围攻之势的纪念武器使用迷彩花纹进行了涂装。 看着我的眼睛，告诉我这只是一件普通的装备 - 指挥官费利克斯.莱利
